assertions.description: The HPX board defines layers in KiCad 5 unquoted format. The analyzer reports copper_layers_used=0 and copper_layer_names=[] because its layer-parsing regex expects quoted names used in KiCad 6+ format.
Both mppt-2420-hpx and mppt-2420-lc report front_side=0 and back_side=0 despite HPX having 184 front-side and 7 back-side components.
